{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032314450440CF8CF6A786ED5D327F"}"},"total":1418},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7339093785513853720","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"其实对这本书的看法比较好，整体正向的主角他们的三观比较正，就是对国家啊，在大义面前的看法都是比较正确的，比较动人这一块儿，就是有一些角色，他的性格呀，性情啊，有一点点的缺陷，可能也是他自己的特点吧.白鹰我很搞不懂，在读的时候感觉这个人就怪怪的,也可能是那个人对他很重要吧.不剧透了，就这样吧.反正就是主角甜甜的，副cp甜甜的[爱慕][爱慕]
再就是大大的文笔挺好的[送心][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1708767668,"group_id":"7168045523797019688","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"资深老书虫｡:.ﾟヽ(*´∀`)ﾉﾟ.:｡","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5OSKIuLHfG894ct1FH5AlP7QByH95bIiN0UFqveTzIA","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/890194aac2e741298ea0a5ff7163f04a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790933&x-signature=CJz3fUZRg%2BuLpjhOwMOHfVFyczg%3D","user_id":"1504549112121376","user_name":"爱吃馋嘴饼的金蛮"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1504549112121376","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1737326141,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7168045523797019688","book_info":{"abstract":"[末世架空+双男主+年下+1v1+甜宠+异能+双强]
嚣张醋精武力值大佬X清冷害羞智商
认真末世文，认真甜宠文
打是真打，甜是真甜！
一同成长，环环相扣，双向奔赴！
连绵暴雨，世界进入一个荒唐的末世。
在森然可怖的雨夜，一株奇怪的植物强行进入林木体内。
而此时，敲门声骤起，家中意外到来一个知晓许多末世秘密的青年。
至此，他的世界里多了一个他。
当世界每一步都是险境。
幸好有你。
……
A、初遇
傅京墨：有人呀，借个宿呗！
林木（拒绝三连）：不行，不要，不方便
傅京墨：你不说话我就自己进来了！
林木：靠，无耻！！
B、许久之后
傅京墨：“林小木。真是傅哥的好宝贝。”
傅京墨：“我会等你，在你看不见的地方，一直等你。”
傅京墨：“不用担心我会改变答案。”
傅京墨：“那就一直相信我吧。”

C、问：如何能在丧尸遍布的世界里存活下来？
傅京墨：炸成灰，扬了
林木：认真喂饱小原
傅京墨：？？？
何泽：少捣乱，跟紧傅哥和木木……
队员A：跟紧傅哥和木木……
队员B：跟紧傅哥和木木……
队员C：跟紧……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o87316b643d0746bc7d350cf6c06ff83a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"椿山有木","author_id":"","book_id":"7168045523797019688","book_name":"末日来袭，在丧尸堆里和大佬贴贴","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9760人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":468,"name":"冰山","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=468&name=冰山&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":476,"name":"双向奔赴","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=476&name=双向奔赴&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":478,"name":"强强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=478&name=强强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7168452324682433036","read_count":"9760","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"430109"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"215","tags":"双男主,现代,空间,末世,甜宠,冰山,双向奔赴,强强,大佬,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/caf4e0078c274f13543f9a2 1e79e98db~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779432304&x-signature=8HKi5plRxNo0p%2F2E5W3swPWXxqI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"105934212632","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.363234e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032314450440CF8CF6A786ED5D327F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":36,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":27850},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1670818357,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7265286269562323771","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"啊啊啊。目前为止最好看的一篇末世文，非常非常好看，不是无脑金手指，要剧情有剧情。真的非常好看，不要因为他的名字而放弃，因为他这个名字感觉受就是奶嗝爱哭软软弱弱，但是这本的受是非常冷静独立理智的人。而且主角两人的感情，在番茄上算的上细水长流，都是一点一点积累起来的，天哪，已经不能用言语来形容了。绝对非常好看","text_exts":[{"e":119,"s":115,"text":"细水长流","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%BB%86%E6%B0%B4%E9%95%BF%E6%B5%81&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774248304ED5D327F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227265286269562323771%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227168045523797019688%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%BB%86%E6%B0%B4%E9%95%BF%E6%B5%81%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691581379,"group_id":"7168045523797019688","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0ctulOGFMOD867FwUjUcea6DHXRe+l8Pstm7V9mpozQ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnove
